_comment_providers: Each key is a provider in packages/tools/src/mcp/mcp-providers.ts MCP_PROVIDERS. 'env' values of the form 'env:NAME' are replaced with process.env.NAME at boot; any missing required env causes the provider to be skipped with a warning. Literal values (no 'env:' prefix) are used as-is. Rename this file to mcp.config.json to activate.
